prs_analyzed.title: feat!: remove Python recipe runner — Rust-only execution
prs_analyzed.author: rysweet
key_observations: BREAKING: Removes 12,241 lines of Python recipe runner code
All execution now requires Rust binary (recipe-runner-rs)
Version bump to 0.6.0 indicates breaking change
41 files deleted including entire adapters/ directory
Test plan shows unchecked items: CI passes, Rust binary verification
Migration path provided but requires external binary installation
Removes 24 test files covering 10,818 LOC of test coverage
prs_analyzed.reasoning: Extreme risk due to hard dependency on external Rust binary. Cannot merge until: (1) recipe-runner-rs is installed in CI, (2) all tests pass, (3) fallback strategy defined for environments without Rust toolchain.

prs_analyzed.title: feat: distributed hive mind with DHT sharding + improved eval recall (51.2% → ≥83.9%)
prs_analyzed.author: rysweet
key_observations: Massive PR: 157 files, 24K additions, 6K deletions, 74 commits
Complex distributed system: HiveMindOrchestrator, DHT sharding, gossip
5 days old and growing (74 commits indicate ongoing development)
Contains multiple independent features bundled together
prs_analyzed.reasoning: Unreviewable scope. Should be split into: (1) HiveMindOrchestrator core, (2) DHT sharding implementation, (3) Eval improvements with benchmarks. Current size creates merge risk and makes rollback impossible.

prs_analyzed.title: feat: Fleet Orchestration — autonomous multi-VM coding agent management
prs_analyzed.author: rysweet
key_observations: Extremely stale: 9 days old with 167 commits
Bundled changes: module split, backend fixes, test coverage, azlin discovery
High comment activity suggests extensive iteration
Likelihood of merge conflicts with main is very high
prs_analyzed.reasoning: Too large, too stale, too complex. After 9 days and 167 commits, this PR is unmergeable. Recommend: (1) Close this PR, (2) Extract critical bug fixes into hotfix PR, (3) Create incremental feature PRs for fleet components with proper sequencing.

critical_issues.issue: 100% of agent PRs are extremely large (>40 files each)
critical_issues.impact: All PRs are effectively unreviewable due to scope
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement hard limits: max 20 files, max 2K LOC changed per PR

critical_issues.issue: 66% of PRs have merge conflicts (2 of 3)
critical_issues.impact: Blocks automated merging, indicates branch divergence
critical_issues.recommendation: Daily auto-rebase for agent PRs or merge/close decision within 48h

critical_issues.issue: PR #2962 introduces hard dependency on external Rust binary
critical_issues.impact: Breaking change affects all recipe execution; no graceful degradation
critical_issues.recommendation: Block merge until CI environment includes recipe-runner-rs and fallback strategy documented

critical_issues.issue: No CI checks configured (all PRs show total_count: 0)
critical_issues.impact: Cannot verify tests pass, lints pass, or builds succeed
critical_issues.recommendation: Configure GitHub Actions to run tests on every PR

critical_issues.impact: Stale PRs accumulate conflicts and become unmergeable
critical_issues.recommendation: SLA: Review within 24h, merge/close decision within 72h

next_actions.rationale: Breaking change requires: (1) Rust binary in CI, (2) all tests passing, (3) migration guide validation
next_actions.estimated_effort: 2-4 hours to update CI and verify

next_actions.action: Close PR #2727 and create incremental PRs
next_actions.rationale: 9 days + 167 commits + 132 files = unmaintainable. Start fresh with focused PRs
next_actions.estimated_effort: Close immediately, extract critical fixes first

next_actions.rationale: 157 files is too large. Split into 3-4 focused PRs or close and restart
